_meta.description: Source of truth for App Store Connect and Game Center localizations.
_meta.instructions: Edit only the 'en' (English) fields. Leave other locales as null. Run upload_metadata.py — Claude fills missing locales and uploads everything. Filled translations are cached back into this file so re-runs are cheap.

whats_new._tone: Brief, friendly release notes. Use line breaks (\n) between bullet points.
whats_new.en: Game Center achievements are here! Win games to start unlocking them as well as celebratory deck themes.
whats_new.da: Game Center-præstationer er her! Vind spil for at begynde at låse dem op sammen med festlige kortdesigns.
whats_new.de: Game Center-Erfolge sind da! Gewinne Spiele, um sie sowie festliche Kartendesigns freizuschalten.
whats_new.es: ¡Ya están aquí los logros de Game Center! Gana partidas para empezar a desbloquearlos junto con vistosos diseños de cartas.
whats_new.fr: Les succès Game Center sont arrivés ! Gagnez des parties pour commencer à les débloquer, ainsi que des thèmes de cartes festifs.
whats_new.hi: Game Center उपलब्धियाँ आ गई हैं! इन्हें और उत्सवपूर्ण डेक थीम अनलॉक करना शुरू करने के लिए गेम जीतें।
whats_new.it: Sono arrivati i risultati di Game Center! Vinci le partite per iniziare a sbloccarli insieme a festosi temi per le carte.
whats_new.ja: Game Centerの実績が登場！ゲームに勝って、実績や華やかなデッキテーマをアンロックしましょう。
whats_new.ko: Game Center 업적이 추가되었습니다! 게임에서 승리하여 업적과 화려한 덱 테마를 잠금 해제해 보세요.
whats_new.nb: Game Center-prestasjoner er her! Vinn spill for å begynne å låse dem opp sammen med festlige kortdesign.
whats_new.nl: Game Center-prestaties zijn er! Win spellen om ze samen met feestelijke kaartthema's te ontgrendelen.
whats_new.pt-BR: As conquistas do Game Center chegaram! Vença partidas para começar a desbloqueá-las e também temas de baralho comemorativos.
whats_new.ru: Достижения Game Center уже здесь! Побеждайте в играх, чтобы открывать их, а также праздничные оформления колод.
whats_new.sv: Game Center-bedrifter är här! Vinn spel för att börja låsa upp dem tillsammans med festliga kortlekteman.
whats_new.tr: Game Center başarımları geldi! Bunları ve şenlikli deste temalarını açmaya başlamak için oyunları kazanın.
whats_new.vi: Thành tích Game Center đã có mặt! Thắng các ván đấu để bắt đầu mở khóa chúng cùng các giao diện bộ bài lễ hội.
whats_new.zh-Hans: Game Center 成就来了！赢得游戏即可开始解锁成就以及精彩的牌背主题。
whats_new.zh-Hant: Game Center 成就來了！贏得遊戲即可開始解鎖成就以及精彩的牌背主題。

version_localizations._inherit_notes: description, keywords, and promotional_text default to inheriting from the most recent prior App Store version per locale. Leave 'en' (and all locales) as null to inherit. Fill in 'en' and ask Claude Code to translate when you want to override.

description._tone: Marketing copy for the App Store listing. Conversational, inviting, highlights gameplay.

keywords._tone: Comma-separated, no spaces after commas to maximize use of the 100-character limit. Search terms only.

promotional_text._tone: Short hook that appears above the description. Updateable without resubmitting a new app version.

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Game-specific name for winning Gin Rummy for the first time.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.en: Win your first game of Gin Rummy.

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You won your first game of Gin Rummy!

title._tone: Punchy, ideally clever. Game-specific name for winning Crazy 8s for the first time.

before_earned_description._tone: Tells the player what they need to do. Imperative.
before_earned_description.en: Win your first game of Crazy 8s.

after_earned_description._tone: Celebrates the player's accomplishment. Past tense.
after_earned_description.en: You won your first game of Crazy 8s!
